message:
Add ghost check transitions and cancel_phase tracking to parallel scheduler

parallel.c: Add ghost_check_task_transition() calls before every state
transition (Created→Running, Running→Completed, Cancelling→Finalizing→
Completed). Fix uint32 overflow in compute_lane_quotas by widening to
uint64_t before multiply. Set cancel_phase to COMPLETED on all terminal
paths.

scheduler.c: Set cancel_phase to COMPLETED on all terminal scheduler
paths (matching parallel.c).

test_cancellation.c: Add cancel_phase assertions to verify phase reaches
COMPLETED after scheduler runs. Extend cancel_phase_query_tracks_progression
test through COMPLETED state.

test_parallel.c: Add new poll helpers (poll_checkpoint_then_complete,
poll_checkpoint_forever) and tests for cancel-phase tracking in parallel
execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
